blocks.text: (1st official start of the academic year semester). In the exigency of service, the faculty concerned shall not avail of the equivalent release hours and carry the teaching load of the current semester as given and conformed. He/she may be compensated for the overtime services rendered as required/as necessary.
Section 12 No faculty member, designated to a non-

seasonal/occasional administrative work, shall be allowed to tender resignation of the designation within/during the regular duration of classes, except for medical condition and other valid reasons. His/her underload shall be treated subject to the usual accounting and auditing rules and regulations.
shall be revoked only at the beginning of the academic year.
Section 14 Full-time lecturers shall be allowed to carry a maximum of
thirty (30) teaching hours per week with at least three (3) or more preparations, except for the lecturers in the
College of Nursing and Allied Health Sciences/ School of Midwifery, College of Maritime Education, College of

Industrial Technology, College of Computing Studies, and College of Engineering. The maximum number of teaching hours shall be stretched reasonably in special case(s) when the number of units and the corresponding teaching hours could not be reduced nor split.
Section 15 Part-time lecturers who wish to teach in the undergraduate
program shall be allowed to carry a maximum of 15 teaching hours per week with at least 3 or more preparations.
Section 16 A faculty shall be designated with a maximum of two (2)
Section 17 For faculty with two or more honorific designations/special

positions, a three-hour deduction from the designated teaching load for every additional designation/special position shall be effected, provided that the 25% of the official time of faculty members concerned shall be credited to actual teaching load.
Section 18 For faculty with approved research/creative
works/extension proposals, a 6-hour deduction shall be
